text.title: Eval-Driven Development: TDD for AI Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the eval-driven-development-tdd-for-ai methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-eval-suite-scope
step.action: Pick strata (persona, locale, edge cases). Aim ≥30 cases per stratum.

step.name: choose-scoring-functions
step.action: Prefer deterministic scorers; LLM-judge only with rubric + golden anchors.

step.name: set-ci-thresholds-and-gates
step.action: Configure regression thresholds per stratum. Gate merge on red.
step.decision-gate: If a stratum is too noisy, fix the suite — do NOT lower the threshold to make CI green.

step.name: require-eval-delta-in-prs
step.action: Add PR template field for eval-delta. Reviewers reject PRs without it.

step.name: schedule-drift-review
step.action: Review suite discrimination + strata vs production traffic + judge model drift. Sunset suites that lose signal.
step.decision-gate: If >30% of cases score 100%, sunset and rebuild rather than patch.
